mapper.select: SELECT event_sequence.sequence_id, event_record.aggregate_id, event_record.operation FROM search_index_event_sequence event_sequence INNER JOIN search_index_event_record event_record ON event_record.event_id = event_sequence.event_id WHERE event_record.aggregate_type = #{aggregateType} AND event_record.processing_status = 'PROCESSED' AND event_sequence.sequence_id > #{afterSequence} ORDER BY event_sequence.sequence_id ASC LIMIT #{limit}
